title: Mizuno16Craft: Glass-Bottom Boats
description: Modification of Mizuno's 16 Craft boats to have glass bottoms.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/views/UCt7ogppIpcAeXy_PSZi77-g?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mizuno16craft-productive-bees)[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/306155360589447178?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&link=https://discord.gg/QKKUV2SBqc)](https://discord.gg/wqw5zCE) _(Spanish server/Servidor Español)_

Resource pack for [Mizuno 16 Craft](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/mizunos-16-craft-cit.html) makes boats with glass bottoms.
Inspired by [Xeadas' Glass-Bottom Boats.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xeadas-glass-bottom-boats/)

After
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fx24gcV2/images/b275d152d59fc571bd0e37421b5557ca331094df.png)
